summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Django multi-circle community platform. Backend APIs working well (88% success rate) but critical frontend session persistence issues identified.

minor_bugs.issue: URL pattern mismatch - should be /invites/info/{token}/ not /invites/{token}/info/
URL pattern mismatch - should be /events/active/ not /events/active-circle/
minor_bugs.impact: Active circle events endpoint not accessible

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Slug already exists error on repeated test runs

critical_bugs.issue: Session persistence failure - users get logged out and redirected to login page after successful login
critical_bugs.impact: Users cannot maintain authenticated sessions, making the app unusable

ui_bugs.issue: Cannot test role switching functionality due to session persistence issues
ui_bugs.impact: Site Manager and Admin features cannot be accessed

integration_issues.issue: User gets redirected back to login page after successful authentication

passed_tests: Frontend profile page access (before session loss)
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend session persistence issue. Users are being logged out and redirected to login page after successful authentication. This prevents testing of role switching, circle management, and other authenticated features. Check AuthContext, session cookies, and CSRF token handling in frontend.
